input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.9.2
            TITLE: the grounded low voltage master switch (glvms) must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.9.2: The Grounded Low Voltage Master Switch (GLVMS) must:
EV.7.9.2 The Grounded Low Voltage Master Switch (GLVMS) must: 
a. Completely stop all power to the GLV System  EV.4.4 
b. Be in the center of a completely red circular area of > 50 mm in diameter 
c. Be labeled “LV”

final_answer: EV.7.9.2 The Grounded Low Voltage Master Switch (GLVMS) must: a. Completely stop all power to the GLV System EV.4.4 b. Be in the center of a completely red circular area of > 50 mm in diameter c. Be labeled “LV”
